body_txt: The all-time classic line prefacing seduction spoken by our Femme Fatale . "Comfortable" will nearly always mean either naked or the sexiest lingerie scene imaginable, accompanied by some Male Gaze . Some men will try to use a variation of this as a pickup line. It rarely works that well. There is however a Spear Counterpart that works better in the form of Intimate Open Shirt . Parodies of this are also frequent, where "something more comfortable" may mean sweats, a sweater and jeans, or any other sort of comfy-but- unsexy attire. No relation to A Form You Are Comfortable With .
